_meta.name: ALM 13B intermediate launch-ready state (2026-04-17)
_meta.mode: launcher+config+eval+watcher prepared on repo; awaiting A2 chain + A2 eval decision

status: PREP_COMPLETE_AWAITING_A2 — artifacts landed; launch conditional on A2 eval borderline (0.85-0.93)
gate_verdict: GREEN for prep, YELLOW for launch (conditional trigger)

artifacts.pod_runner_planned: /workspace/launch_alm_13b.sh (pod-side bash mirror, NOT YET SHIPPED — ship only if launch triggered)

all_must_hold: A1 step_3000 adapter in R2 or local (training/launch_alm_a2_orch.hexa dependency satisfied)
A2-Orch step_3000 adapter in R2 or local
A2-Tool step_1500 adapter in R2 or local
A2 merged eval hire_sim_lenient score in [0.85, 0.93) BORDERLINE band
H100 pod available (prefer reuse of A2 pod lnzliav2e8du6i)
ALM13B_A2_EVAL_SCORE env exported (float, for in-band preflight check)
blocker_bypass_rules: A2 eval >= 0.93 → SKIP 13B, launch 70B directly (13B adds cost with no signal)
A2 eval < 0.85  → HALT, do NOT run 13B or 70B (recipe broken, redesign required)

launch_sequence.step_2_run_a2_eval: ssh pod: hexa run training/eval_alm_14b.hexa --ckpt <a2-tool step_1500>
launch_sequence.step_4_branch_decision: if >=0.93 SKIP 13B; if <0.85 HALT; else proceed to step 5
launch_sequence.step_7_export_eval_score: ssh pod: export ALM13B_A2_EVAL_SCORE=<value from step 3>
launch_sequence.step_8_fire: ssh pod: tmux new -d -s alm-13b 'cd /workspace/anima && ALM13B_A2_EVAL_SCORE=<x> hexa run training/launch_alm_13b.hexa 2>&1 | tee /workspace/alm_13b.log'
launch_sequence.step_11_decide_70b: 13B eval verdict PASS → authorize 70B. BORDERLINE → operator call. FAIL → halt.

exact_launch_command_template: ALM13B_A2_EVAL_SCORE=0.875 tmux new -d -s alm-13b 'cd /workspace/anima && ALM13B_A2_EVAL_SCORE=0.875 hexa run training/launch_alm_13b.hexa 2>&1 | tee /workspace/alm_13b.log; echo [SESSION] 13B ended; sleep 3600'

config_snapshot.base: Qwen/Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct + A1 + A2-Orch + A2-Tool adapters merged
config_snapshot.lr_rationale: sqrt-mean between A2-Orch 5e-6 and 70B spec 3e-6; validates 70B LR assumption

cost_breakdown.headroom_note: Compute-only estimate ~6-8h at 1500 steps × grad_accum 8 × seq 1024 × r=48 on 14B + bf16. 12h wall includes adapter-merge stage (1-2h I/O), corpus tokenize, eval_every=100 inline, R2 bulk upload. If run finishes in 8h the pod can be released early ($12-15 saving).

de_risk_math.de_risk_value: Spend $36 to validate recipe before $240-480 burn. Payoff ratio 6.7x-13.3x
de_risk_math.only_worthwhile_when: A2 eval in borderline 0.85-0.93. Outside band = wasted $36.

expected_timeline.13b_launch_trigger_latest: 2026-04-18T00:00Z (if operator delay for A2 eval review)

trigger_A_manual.description: Operator reviews A2 eval + fires launch_alm_13b.hexa with ALM13B_A2_EVAL_SCORE env
trigger_A_manual.rationale: Operator sees A2 eval + 10KO+10EN samples before spending $36. Manual is default per feedback_auto_recommend. Loop pattern per feedback_loop_means_roadmap.

trigger_B_watcher_autofire.description: watch_a2_fire_13b.hexa detects A2-Tool done + A2 eval in band + fires 13B automatically
trigger_B_watcher_autofire.rationale: Disabled per user task: '작성은 하되 기본 disabled flag'. Enable only after verifying A2 eval run + band check logic on live data.

A2_eval_PASS_high.rationale: A2 exceeds 70B authorization gate. Adding 13B hop costs $36 without new signal.

A2_eval_PASS_borderline.rationale: De-risk $240-480 70B burn with $36 intermediate validation. 6.7-13.3x payoff ratio.

A2_eval_FAIL.rationale: Recipe failing at 14B. 13B would carry broken recipe forward. Corpus quality or hyperparameters must be redesigned before any scale-up.
recovery_paths: Expand corpus with Korean dialogue (raise from 1B eff tokens)
Rewind to A1 final (skip A2 Orch/Tool) + re-eval
LR reduction: try lr=2e-6 at r=32 on 14B

blockers_to_launch: A2-Tool not yet complete (blocks A2 eval, which blocks 13B decision)
corpus_alm_13b_intermediate.txt not yet assembled (operator action required pre-launch)
A2 eval score not yet measured (requires eval_alm_14b.hexa run on A2-Tool merged ckpt)
No pod-side .sh mirror shipped (launcher is repo-side; pod ship deferred until trigger)
blockers_resolved: watcher written but disabled (training/watch_a2_fire_13b.hexa ENABLE_13B_AUTOFIRE=0 default)
guardrails_applied: No commit per user task 'NO commit'
No H100 pod changes per user task 'NO 학습 pod 변경'
No 70B pod interaction per user task 'NO 70B pod'
file naming: 13b is parameter-class ID (not version number) per feedback_no_version_in_filename
A2 adapter chain merge respects feedback_no_resume_data_change (fresh LoRA on merged-base)
Label production → R2 permanent upload per feedback_r2_checkpoint
MFS quota 20GB dd preflight in launcher per runpod_mfs_quota
Bulk R2 upload post-training per runpod_mfs_quota (no in-training rclone)
Save_every=250 (>=2000 is CLM-era rule — ALM A2 uses 500; 13B 250 for finer eval granularity)
ckpt dir never reused (launcher refuses if exists)
Watcher disabled by default per user task '기본 disabled flag'
next_actions_on_trigger: 1. ssh pod lnzliav2e8du6i (assumes A2-Tool complete there)
3. run eval_alm_14b.hexa on A2-Tool merged ckpt, capture hire_sim_lenient score
5. assemble + ship training/corpus_alm_13b_intermediate.txt (A1 blend + hire_sim30 + tool + KO)
6. tmux new -d -s alm-13b '... hexa run training/launch_alm_13b.hexa ...'
10. release A2 pod if 70B pod is allocated elsewhere
ready_rationale: All repo-side artifacts landed. Launch gated on (a) A2-Tool completion, (b) A2 eval score measurement, (c) eval score landing in borderline band, (d) operator corpus assembly, (e) explicit operator trigger per default-disabled watcher policy.
